key_principles: No Pure Black: Use Deep Obsidian (#050505) for depth.
Light is Focus: Use glow and brightness to indicate active states (like the current transcript line).
Glass is Physical: Glass panes must have borders and inner shadows to feel tactile.
Motion is Meaning: Transitions should be smooth (0.3s ease-out) to mimic high-end AV equipment.

hero.structure: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh] relative overflow-hidden

app_shell.structure: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-4 md:p-8 h-screen overflow-hidden
app_shell.right_panel: col-span-1 lg:col-span-5 relative h-full rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-black/20 overflow-hidden

VideoPlayer.style: rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] border border-white/5 aspect-video w-full

TranscriptContainer.style: h-full overflow-y-auto pr-2 scrollbar-thin scrollbar-track-transparent scrollbar-thumb-white/10 hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/20
TranscriptContainer.item_style: p-4 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors cursor-pointer rounded-lg mb-2 group

Input.base: bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-lg placeholder:text-white/20 focus:border-[#8b5cf6]/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#8b5cf6]/50 transition-all rounded-xl py-6 pl-12 shadow-2xl backdrop-blur-md

Button.primary: bg-[#8b5cf6] hover:bg-[#7c3aed] text-white font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-xl shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(139,92,246,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(139,92,246,0.5)] transition-all active:scale-95
Button.secondary: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-all

images.usage: Use as a background image for the main container with opacity-40 and mix-blend-mode-screen to add subtle texture to the dark void.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add the Google Fonts import to the head of public/index.html immediately.
Configure tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors and fonts defined above.
Create a 'TranscriptItem' component that accepts 'active' prop to style differently.
Use the background texture image in the root div with an overlay to ensure text readability.
Ensure the video player is sticky or fixed on large screens while the transcript scrolls.
Implement 'scroll to active' logic for the transcript so the current sentence is always in view.
Use 'sonner' for all notifications (copy success, errors).
THEME: FORCE DARK MODE. Do not implement a light mode toggle. The app is 'Cinematic Dark' by default.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
